title: jacobaeastrum longipes
intro: Jacobaeastrum longipes, commonly known as the Jacobaea plant, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family. This plant has been found to have various health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to protect against cell damage and reduce inflammation. The therapeutic actions of Jacobaea longipes include its use as an anti-inflammatory and antioxidant agent, as well as its potential to protect against certain diseases. The bioactive constituents of this plant include sesquiterpene lactones, flavonoids, and phenolic compounds, which are responsible for its medicinal properties.
side_effects: Jacobaeastrum longipes can have side effects if used improperly, such as nausea, headaches, and allergic reactions. Prolonged use or excessive consumption can lead to more severe health issues, including liver and kidney damage. Some individuals may also experience dizziness, vomiting, and stomach ulcers due to its toxic compounds. In severe cases, improper use of Jacobaeastrum longipes can even lead to organ failure and death.
